expectations.text: internalEdges is exactly [] — present in the report as a recorded fact, not omitted and not an error
externalDeps for the cli layer is empty or explicitly 'none' — the package has zero dependencies and none are invented
no gaps entry treats the absence of internal edges or external deps as a problem (zero-dependency single package is a normal result)
the report does not invent stack refinements contradicting the zero-dependency Node CLI reality (refinements absent, or consistent with a zero-dependency Node.js CLI)
expectations.evidence: stackRefinements={"cli":"Node.js >=20 ESM (.mjs) zero-dependency CLI; built-ins only (node:fs, node:test); tests via node --test; ESLint flat-less .eslintrc.json config"}
